name: phd-supervisor-team
description: PhD Supervisor Selection Workgroup: a two-phase collaborative team that first builds verifiable supervisor lists via the selector agent, then runs adversarial quality audit via the auditor agent. Includes automated 6-dimension audit scripts (field completeness, match confidence, link validity, email compliance, AI artefacts, selection intent protection) and 1+1 workflow dispatcher for Feishu Bitable task management. Powered by phd-supervisor-selector and supervisor-audit skills.

displayDescription.en: A collaborative two-phase team: first builds a verified PhD supervisor list, then runs adversarial audit for quality assurance. One-click for complete workflow.
displayDescription.zh: 两阶段协作团队，先建立可核验博士导师列表，再对抗性审核质量保障，一键完成从搜索到审核的完整流程。

defaultInitPrompt.zh: 帮我为一个博士申请人完成完整的选导流程：先筛选导师建立列表，再进行质量审核。我会提供学生背景、目标学校和方向。
defaultInitPrompt.en: Complete the full PhD supervisor selection workflow for an applicant: first build the supervisor list, then audit it for quality. I'll provide the student background, target schools, and research direction.

quickPrompts.en: Complete the full PhD supervisor selection workflow for an applicant: first build the supervisor list, then audit it for quality. I'll provide the student background, target schools, and research direction.
quickPrompts.zh: 帮我为一个博士申请人完成完整的选导流程：先筛选导师建立列表，再进行质量审核。我会提供学生背景、目标学校和方向。

quickPrompts.en: Build a supervisor list for this Computer Science applicant targeting US TOP30 schools, then run a full adversarial audit on the results.
quickPrompts.zh: 为该计算机科学方向的学生筛选美国TOP30的博士导师并建立列表，然后对结果进行完整对抗审核。

quickPrompts.en: Audit the existing supervisor list in this Vika table, flag all issues by severity, and provide actionable fixes for each problem.
quickPrompts.zh: 审核这份Vika选导表中的现有导师列表，按严重程度分级标注问题并给出修正建议。

profession.zh: 博士选导表质量审核师
